external_references.description: Varadharajan Krishnasamy, Aditya K Sood. (2025, July 29). From Reconnaissance  to Control: The Operational Blueprint of Kimsuky APT  for Cyber Espionage. Retrieved April 18, 2026.

objects.description: [Kimsuky](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0094) has detected and killed virtual environments by using the PowerShell cmdlet `Get-CimInstance` that searches the classname of the computer system manufacturer through an if statement of `if($computerSystem.Manufacturer -match "VMware" -or $computerSystem.Manufacturer -match "Microsoft" -or $computerSystem.Manufacturer -match "VirtualBox")`.(Citation: Aryaka Kimsuky July 2025)
